channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Tech Stocks Face Major Pressure as Trump Unveils Sweeping Tariffs - A Tech-First Approach
item.description: President Trump's latest tariff announcement sends shockwaves through the tech industry, impacting major players like Apple, Nvidia, and Amazon. Analysts warn of significant pressure on tech stocks due to demand destruction, supply chain disruptions, and exposure to China and Taiwan.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
